Module 6

Course wrap-up: You're ready to consult with confidence

Course wrap-up

You're ready to consult with confidence

You've reached the end of this course - well done.

You now have the product knowledge, language, and confidence to support customers across the O Beauty Co make-up range.

One final tip

When in doubt, keep it simple:

  • What does it do?
  • Who is it for?
  • How will it help this customer today?

If you can answer those three questions, you're already doing a great consult.

You're ready.

You're ready. Go help customers feel confident, comfortable, and cared for - one product at a time.

Download the product information here
